data.title: Ensure Email Delivery from Current and New Autodesk Forma Domains
data.description:
Please see email below. Can you please ensure that we continue to receive emails from the current domain and the new domain? More info is listed below.

Thanks!

Gretchen Hommrich Adams
PMC | Consulting Engineers<http://www.powermgmt.com/>
(615) 760-2621

From: David Sierra <dsierra@powermgmt.com>
Sent: Thursday, February 26, 2026 12:33 PM
To: Gretchen Hommrich <ghommrich@powermgmt.com>
Subject: Fw: Important: Autodesk Forma Email Notification Sender Update

I'm not sure if you or anyone else gets these emails.


Thanks,

-Dave



DAVID H. SIERRA, P.E.

Mechanical Engineer



PMC | Consulting Engineers

Direct: 615-760-2622

www.powermgmt.com<http://www.powermgmt.com/>



________________________________
From: Autodesk Construction Team <comms@acs.autodesk.com<mailto:comms@acs.autodesk.com>>
Sent: Thursday, February 26, 2026 11:09 AM
To: David Sierra <dsierra@powermgmt.com<mailto:dsierra@powermgmt.com>>
Subject: Important: Autodesk Forma Email Notification Sender Update


Dear Account Administrator,

Starting March 24, 2026, as part of the update from Autodesk Construction Cloud to Autodesk Forma, notification emails will transition to updated email sender domains (i.e. no-reply@mail.forma[.region].autodesk.com<mailto:no-reply@mail.forma[.region].autodesk.com>, etc.)

Action recommended:
To allow notification emails to continue to be delivered as expected, please:

  1.  Continue to maintain acc.autodesk.com on any existing allowlisting or safe-sender settings
  2.  Visit the Help content here<https://emconstruction.autodesk.com/n/NTcyLUpTVi03NzUAAAGgOeYFv1WUVdlkNNQYewjpxV-sA_isadcRsljtUEkdGuWc49dVxBYygluasHF_SxhXBV6NyAw=> for details and instructions about the Autodesk Forma email sender domain updates
  3.  Update any existing allowlisting or safe-sender settings to include your region-specific domains listed in the Help content

If your organization uses email security controls or quarantine workflows, you may wish to confirm delivery settings are aligned.

Please remind project members to review any personal inbox rules related to notification emails. Additionally, project teams can always update their in-product notification settings. Finally, no product URLs or links are currently changing.

Additional email notifications and in-product reminders over the next month will reinforce this update. If you have any questions, please use the in-product support chat.

Thank you,
Autodesk Forma

Autodesk
One Market Street, Suite 400, San Francisco, CA 94105
? Autodesk, Inc. All rights reserved
Unsubscribe<https://emconstruction.autodesk.com/NTcyLUpTVi03NzUAAAGgOeYFv8G0Wol_z2jHZmoI-GjvILnFdvpFEcd91MRY8aA-DqnOE-pgFpU7mUmhFzcC43rIEag=> | Privacy Policy<https://emconstruction.autodesk.com/NTcyLUpTVi03NzUAAAGgOeYFv-bhZwbzYLCDyHJxkmmMjzmYJC4cmQx8Azis12Vjny8vve0mjXIgn52JSeV0vvGDF5w=>

Caution
External Message
________________________________

data.title: FW: microsoft admin account
data.description:
From: Scott York <syork@artisanalwatersolutions.com>
Sent: Thursday, February 26, 2026 2:07 PM
To: Fae Parker Shaffer <fae@refreshtech.com>; Bob Shaffer <bob@refreshtech.com>
Subject: microsoft admin account

Some people who received this message don't often get email from syork@artisanalwatersolutions.com<mailto:syork@artisanalwatersolutions.com>. Learn why this is important<https://aka.ms/LearnAboutSenderIdentification>
Hi Fae,

I called earlier about getting full access to my Microsoft account and no longer having refresh technology managing my subscriptions. How do we go about this process? I want to pay Microsoft directly and manage these accounts on my own. I called your office earlier and said they were opening a ticket but I have not heard back.


[cid:image001.png@01DCA729.3C4EFEE0]


Scott York
MANAGING DIRECTOR
[cid:image002.png@01DCA729.3C4EFEE0]

syork@artisanalwatersolutions.com<mailto:syork@artisanalwatersolutions.com>
[cid:image003.png@01DCA729.3C4EFEE0]

704-315-6344
[cid:image004.png@01DCA729.3C4EFEE0]

18637 Northline Dr, Suite H, Cornelius, NC 28031
[cid:image005.png@01DCA729.3C4EFEE0]

www.artisanalwatersolutions.com<https://artisanalwatersolutions.com/>


Caution
This email originated outside the organization. Do not click any links or attachments unless you know the sender.
________________________________

data.description:

Thank you!

Best,


Monique Jackson

Paralegal

196 N. Trade Street

Matthews, NC 28105

data.title: Re: Clio Single sign-on
data.description:
From Lee Taylor <lee@stratuslegalconsulting.com>: Hello Refresh,
I am the firm's Clio consultant. Please let me know if you need any
additional information from me.
Below is set up instructions for SSO in Clio.
https://help.clio.com/hc/en-us/articles/41135505613339-Single-Sign-On
Best,
Lee

Lee F. Taylor
Attorney/Founder,
Stratus Legal Consulting
www.stratuslegalconsulting.com
[image: Clio Gold Certified Partner Badge]
dba Lee F. Taylor Law, PLLC



On Wed, Feb 25, 2026 at 3:59?PM Diego Lopez <dlopez@shanklelaw.com> wrote:

> Hello — In anticipation of going live with Clio, we would like to set up
> Single sign-on with Microsoft. Would you please assist us with this process
> next Thursday, March 5th. We can set up a call at 12:00pm or after in which
> I could give you access to our Clio Admin account to enable it for our
> staff. Thank you.
>
>
>
> [image: photo] <http://www.shanklelaw.com>
>
> *Diego Lopez*
> *Operations Manager, Shankle Law Firm*
>
> [image: icon] 6115 Park South Drive, Suite 310, Charlotte, NC 28210
> <https://maps.google.com/?q=6115%20Park%20South%20Drive,%20Suite%20310,%20Charlotte,%20NC%2028210>
>
> [image: icon] 704-370-1212  [image: icon] 704-370-1213
>
> [image: icon] www.shanklelaw.com
>
> [image: icon] dlopez@shanklelaw.com
>
> IMPORTANT: The contents of this email and any attachments are
> confidential. They are intended for the named recipient(s) only. If you
> have received this email by mistake, please notify the sender immediately
> and do not disclose the contents to anyone or make copies thereof.
>
> [image: __tpx__]
>

data.title: ITAD Summit 2026 (IT Asset Disposition) - Secure Your Hotel early at Las Vegas
data.description:
From marketing <marketing@globalexpocapitals.com>: Dear Exhibitors,

We are pleased to offer exclusive hotel booking options for ITAD Summit 2026 (IT Asset Disposition),
taking place in August 4-5, 2026 - The
Bellagio - Las Vegas.

To make your accommodation easier, we’ve selected top-rated
hotels near the venue with exclusive rates:

• The Bellagio – 0.0 miles | 5*| $259 per night instead of
$289

Special
rate with limited availability

(Booking link will be included below)

https://signnow.com/s/4z15BBck 

 • The Palazzo at The
Venetian Resort – 0.9 miles | 5*| $229 per night

(Booking link will be included below)

https://signnow.com/s/ZpICo6Vc 

 All bookings include:

• Instant confirmation by email

• Free changes (names, dates, rooms) up to 15 days before
check-in

• Transparent pricing – no hidden costs

 

Note: 10%
Discount for group reservation (more than 8 rooms)

We recommend booking early to secure the best rate and
preferred location.

Best regards,

Linda Henry

Reservations Team

Email: mailto:marketing@ExhibitsBookingKey.com

Get Outlook for iOS<https://aka.ms/o0ukef>

data.title: Enhance Outlook Rooms Calendar for Managing Multiple Conference Rooms and Meeting Details
data.description:
Good morning,

I'm hoping someone can help me with a way to select rooms for meetings.  We have multiple conference rooms and multiple users (including our NCWorks team who are not CW employees).  I'm not sure if I am explaining this well, but we need a better way to manage the following spaces:


  *   Conference Room 1
  *   Conference Room 2
  *   Combined Conference Rooms 1 & 2 (there is a retractable wall and for larger meetings, we need to use both)
  *   NextGen Conference Room
  *   Team Room 2
  *   Team Room 3
  *   Charlotte Works Conference Room

If there is a way to add fields, we it would be helpful to add:

  *   Number of attendees
  *   Technology needs
  *   Other

We probably need to have a conversation to better explain this.  I am available today until 3:00.

Thanks!

Aly

Alyson M Ferko
Organizational Support Manager
8601 McAlpine Park Dr|Suite 130|Charlotte, NC  28211
704-206-1344 Direct
aferko@charlotteworks.com<mailto:aferko@charlotteworks.com> | www.charlotteworks.com<http://www.charlotteworks.com/>

[cid:image001.jpg@01DCA70C.60F705C0]

Our Mission: Leading the development of a skilled and in-demand workforce by engaging businesses, aligning community partners, empowering and connecting job seekers to meaningful employment, and fostering inclusive economic growth.

I'm hoping someone can help me with a way to select rooms for meetings.  We have multiple conference rooms and multiple users (including our NCWorks team who are not CW employees).  I'm not sure if I am explaining this well, but we need a better way to manage the following spaces:


  *   Conference Room 1

  *   NextGen Conference Room
  *   Team Room 2
  *   Team Room 3
  *   Charlotte Works Conference Room

If there is a way to add fields, we it would be helpful to add:

  *   Number of attendees
  *   Technology needs
  *   Other

We probably need to have a conversation to better explain this.  I am available today until 3:00.

Aly
